title: SRO 76 DATED 19 APR 1999
text: New Delhi, the 19th April 1999 S.R.O 76- In exercise of the powers conferred by section 123 of the Coast Guard Act, 1978 (30 of 1978), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules, further, to amend the Coast Guard General rules, 1986, namely ;- 1. (1) These rules may be called the Coast Guard (General) (Amendment) Rules, 1998. (2) They shall be deemed to have come into force on the 13th day of May, 1998. 2. In the Coast Guard (General) Rules, 1986, for rule 20, the following rule shall be substituted namely:- “20. Retirement – (1) Retirement age for officers holding a rank higher than that of a Commandant shall be sixty years and for officers of other ranks it shall be fifty seven years. (2) Retirement age of enrolled persons shall be fifty seven years.” [ File No. OF/0246/65/DO(T)/D(N.II)] S.L. BUNKER. Director Note:- The principal Rules were published in the Gazette of India vide number SRO 4(E) date 2nd May 1986, and subsequently amended vide SRO(S) 4(E) dated 13th Feb 1992 and SRO 201 dated 19th Nov 1996. -- 1 of 1 --
